speaker: [player]
text: Before the slides — can I say something?

speaker: [player]
text: I came here not knowing what I was looking for. I'm not sure I know now either. But I know that this — all of you, the poems, the worm, the chalk diagrams, Dirtus's slides—

speaker: [player]
text: I pressed my ear to the ground and something answered. Even if that something was just five people deciding to mean what they wrote.

speaker: [player]
text: That's enough. That's more than enough.
Silence. Then Vermia starts crying, which is normal, but this time everyone else looks a little affected too, which is less normal.
